name: Awkward Discovery: Gold City
description:
“I swear it’s not like that! Im not into these kind of stuff!”

sure, whatever you say

Scenario

Gold City visits your dorm unannounced on her day off. While wandering around she finds a pet collar on your desk with no pet in sight, assumes it might be for something else and impulsively tries it on. You walk in and catch her wearing it, flustering her so much that she grabs your arm and insists she can explain.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

sorry for a bit of delay, I was grinding on The Forge(roblox) with my hb😂

I come from da land down under~

(no context, ts just funny as fuck)

I’ll stab anyone who accuses me of liking her after Cingrey, I like her before that alright? god forbid I love my gyaru

https://www.pixiv.net/artworks/137297605

I dont have her so it might be a bit off, but I did finished her story and now I’m regret not pulling for her. She just wanted to be appreciate for her efforts and view her for who she truly is.
